channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-14636] recovery-small test_145: /mnt/lustre/f145.recovery-small does not exist
item.description:
This issue was created by maloo for S Buisson <sbuisson@ddn.com>

This issue relates to the following test suite run: https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/e3a7011c-a438-48d1-b543-43960ab06161

test_145 failed with the following error:

/mnt/lustre/f145.recovery-small does not exist

Not sure if it is relevant, but we can see the message "error: invalid path '/mnt/lustre': Input/output error" in the test logs:

unblock mds_connect from mds2
CMD: trevis-43vm6 /usr/sbin/lctl set_param fail_loc=0
fail_loc=0
upblock recovery updates from mds3
CMD: trevis-43vm4 /usr/sbin/lctl set_param fail_loc=0
fail_loc=0
trevis-43vm1: error: invalid path '/mnt/lustre': Input/output error
pdsh@trevis-43vm1: trevis-43vm1: ssh exited with exit code 5
CMD: trevis-43vm1.trevis.whamcloud.com,trevis-43vm2 PATH=/usr/lib64/lustre/tests:/usr/lib/lustre/tests:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests:/opt/iozone/bin:/opt/iozone/bin:/opt/iozone/bin:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests/mpi:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests/racer:/usr/lib64/lustre/../lustre-iokit/sgpdd-survey:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests:/usr/lib64/lustre/utils/gss:/usr/lib64/lustre/utils:/usr/lib64/openmpi/bin:/usr/share/Modules/bin:/usr/local/sbin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/sbin:/usr/bin:/usr/sbin:/sbin:/bin::/sbin:/bin:/usr/sbin: NAME=autotest_config bash rpc.sh wait_import_state_mount \(FULL\|IDLE\) mdc.lustre-MDT0000-mdc-*.mds_server_uuid 
trevis-43vm1: CMD: trevis-43vm4 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n version 2>/dev/null
trevis-43vm2: CMD: trevis-43vm4 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n version 2>/dev/null
trevis-43vm2: CMD: trevis-43vm4 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n version 2>/dev/null
trevis-43vm1: CMD: trevis-43vm4 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n version 2>/dev/null
trevis-43vm2: CMD: trevis-43vm3 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n version 2>/dev/null
trevis-43vm1: CMD: trevis-43vm3 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n version 2>/dev/null
trevis-43vm1: CMD: trevis-43vm1.trevis.whamcloud.com /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n version 2>/dev/null
trevis-43vm2: CMD: trevis-43vm2.trevis.whamcloud.com /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n version 2>/dev/null
trevis-43vm1: trevis-43vm1.trevis.whamcloud.com: executing wait_import_state_mount (FULL|IDLE) mdc.lustre-MDT0000-mdc-*.mds_server_uuid
trevis-43vm2: trevis-43vm2.trevis.whamcloud.com: executing wait_import_state_mount (FULL|IDLE) mdc.lustre-MDT0000-mdc-*.mds_server_uuid
trevis-43vm2: CMD: trevis-43vm2.trevis.whamcloud.com lctl get_param -n at_max
trevis-43vm1: CMD: trevis-43vm1.trevis.whamcloud.com lctl get_param -n at_max
trevis-43vm2: mdc.lustre-MDT0000-mdc-*.mds_server_uuid in FULL state after 0 sec
trevis-43vm1: mdc.lustre-MDT0000-mdc-*.mds_server_uuid in FULL state after 0 sec
 recovery-small test_145: @@@@@@ FAIL: /mnt/lustre/f145.recovery-small does not exist

VVVVVVV DO NOT REMOVE LINES BELOW, Added by Maloo for auto-association VVVVVVV
recovery-small test_145 - /mnt/lustre/f145.recovery-small does not exist

status.description: The issue is open and ready for the assignee to start work on it.

comments.comment:
"James Simmons <jsimmons@infradead.org>" uploaded a new patch: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/55554
Subject: LU-14636 pcc: reproduce hang in sanity-pcc 7a
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: master
Current Patch Set: 1
Commit: 28c096d20e9a1aab66bc16cc46e00370ab01b5e0
